scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: 1. **Backup your keys**: Always keep a secure backup of your keys or mnemonic phrases.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: 2. **Secure your keystore**: Ensure your keystore directory has appropriate permissions.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Tangle Gateway is a unified inference API. One endpoint, hundreds of models, automatic routing across centralized providers and decentralized operators.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - **Operator network.** Route to decentralized operators running [Blueprints](/developers/blueprints/introduction) on the Tangle network who compete on price, latency, and reputation.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: | **Operators** | Decentralized inference providers on Tangle                | Default for operator-pinned requests and SpendAuth             |

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: | **Operator network**  | None                                  | Decentralized operators compete on price/latency         |

scannerFindings.message: Launch-state claim. Verify whether this is still future tense or already shipped.
scannerFindings.text: | **Web search tools**  | Perplexity, Parallel, provider-native | Not yet (planned)                                        |

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - **Operator network.** Access decentralized inference providers who compete on price and latency.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Plus decentralized operators on the Tangle network running [Blueprints](/developers/blueprints/introduction):

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: description: Route inference through decentralized operators on the Tangle network.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - Use security requirements and operator commitments to express what “secure enough” means for your service.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: 1. **Service fee revenue** from blueprint services they help secure (paid in the service’s payment token).

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Tangle uses a credits system to recognize contributions and make participation auditable. Credits are computed off-chain, published as a Merkle root, and claimed on-chain through a dedicated contract.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Credits are not token transfers. They are a verifiable record of participation that can be used for programs, access, or distributions over time.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: For secure production deployments, see [Sandboxing and Security](/operators/manager/security).

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - Innovation in new blockchain services by harnessing decentralized resources

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Staking aligns operators, developers, and stakers around service reliability and makes it possible to secure on-demand services without a consensus-layer dependency.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Liquid staking on Tangle lets stakers keep a transferable position while their assets secure operator-run services. It is implemented as ERC-7540 liquid delegation vaults that wrap the standard staking flow in `MultiAssetDelegation`.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: The [Gateway](/gateway) routes inference requests across centralized providers and decentralized operators. It handles model selection, compliance filtering ([ZDR](/gateway/zdr), [no-train](/gateway/no-train)), [BYOK](/gateway/byok) credential management, and billing.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - **Verifiable outcomes**: Logs, metadata, and evaluations make results auditable.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: - **Operator marketplace**: runtime hosting becomes decentralized and paid through the protocol.

scannerFindings.message: Load-bearing claim. Make sure the same paragraph names the mechanism, source of truth, or limitation.
scannerFindings.text: Deploy AI workflows on protected data with strict isolation, resource limits, and audit logs. Outputs are verifiable and reviewable.

scannerFindings.message: Em dash in prose. Replace with a period, comma, colon, or rewrite.
scannerFindings.text: - `securityCommitments == []` — no per-asset commitment supplied. Only valid when the request has no security requirements OR the only requirement is the protocol-default TNT requirement (auto-filled at min-exposure).

scannerFindings.message: Em dash in prose. Replace with a period, comma, colon, or rewrite.
scannerFindings.text: - `blsPubkey == [0,0,0,0]` — operator does NOT register a BLS pubkey for aggregated job-result signing. BLS is opt-in; the protocol accepts any operator.

scannerFindings.message: Em dash in prose. Replace with a period, comma, colon, or rewrite.
scannerFindings.text: - `teeCommitments == []` — operator does NOT bind to a TEE attestation profile.

scannerFindings.message: Em dash in prose. Replace with a period, comma, colon, or rewrite.
scannerFindings.text: Canonical TEE attestation nonce binding for `requestId` on this contract on this chain. Operators MUST submit this exact value as `nonceBinding` in any `TeeAttestationCommitment` for the request — it eliminates cross-request attestation replay at approval time.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Background services are powerful components that enhance the capabilities of your Blueprint Runner by providing continuous support operations. By implementing well-designed background services, you can build more robust, efficient, and feature-rich Blueprints.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Building a Blueprint Runner involves setting up various components that work together to execute your Tangle Blueprint. By following this guide and adhering to best practices, you can create a robust and efficient Blueprint Runner for your blueprint service on the Tangle Network.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Consumers are essential components that translate job results into meaningful actions in your Blueprint Runner. By implementing robust and efficient consumers, you can ensure that your Blueprint operates reliably and effectively.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Jobs are the core building blocks of your Blueprint, encapsulating the business logic that processes events and produces meaningful results. By implementing well-designed jobs, you can create powerful and flexible Blueprints that can handle a wide range of use cases.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Producers are essential components that capture and prepare events for processing in your Blueprint Runner. By implementing robust and efficient producers, you can ensure that your Blueprint reliably processes desired events.

scannerFindings.message: Inflated adjective. Replace with the mechanism, number, or concrete capability.
scannerFindings.text: Routers are a fundamental component of Blueprint Runners, enabling efficient job execution and management. By properly configuring and utilizing routers, you can build robust and performant Blueprints.

scannerFindings.text: 7. If all the information is correct, the **Deposit + Delegate** (or **Deposit** if just depositing) button should be enabled. Click on it to initiate the transaction.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Simply select the unstake request(s) that you'd like to cancel, then click on the **Cancel Unstake** button to initiate the transaction.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Once an unstake request has reached its maturity, you can **execute** it to actually unstake and release the assets.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Tangle DApp makes this process easy by simply clicking on the **Execute All** button. There's no need to select specific unstake requests, as this action will execute all unstake requests that have reached their maturity within a single transaction. If the button is disabled, it means that there are no unstake requests that have reached their maturity yet.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: 2. After the unstake period, you can **execute** the withdrawal to actually release the assets.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Simply select the withdraw request(s) that you'd like to cancel, then click on the **Cancel Withdraw** button to initiate the transaction.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Once a withdraw request has reached its maturity, you can **execute** it to actually withdraw and release the assets.

scannerFindings.message: Softener or filler. Keep only if it changes technical meaning.
scannerFindings.text: Tangle DApp makes this process easy by simply clicking on the **Execute All** button. There's no need to select specific withdraw requests, as this action will execute all withdraw requests that have reached their maturity within a single transaction. If the button is disabled, it means that there are no withdraw requests that have reached their maturity yet.
